name: CAMEL
description: Pioneering multi-agent framework for role-playing collaboration, scaling-law research, and MCP server exports with 20+ toolkits and a native MCPAgent class.

skills.name: Role-Play Collaboration
skills.description: Pair a user agent and assistant agent in structured role-playing conversations to solve tasks through principled multi-agent debate.

skills.name: MCP Agent Integration
skills.description: Instantiate an MCPAgent that reads tools from any MCP server and injects them into the CAMEL agent loop at runtime.

skills.name: Export as MCP Server
skills.description: Publish any CAMEL toolkit as a callable MCP server via camel-toolkits-mcp for use with Claude, Cursor, or other MCP clients.
